AdvancedBuildingControl.NAME: Advanced Building Control
AdvancedBuildingControl.SIP[RandomizeToo: Randomize the building's seed to change billboard sizes/positions, trees, props and colors. Randomizing is irreversible. This does not change the company itself.
AdvancedBuildingControl.SIP[BrandTooltip:
Changing brand is completely visual only.
It does not affect simulation and does not change the company or the resources used/manufactured.
AdvancedBuildingControl.SIP[StorageToolt:
Modify the building's Tradeable Resources.
When a tradeable resource is disabled, any resource currently stored will be lost permanently.
AdvancedBuildingControl.BRAND[OtherBrand:
The following brands are from companies that's not the same as the current company.
Selecting any of these will not have any effect on the business/simulation either.
AdvancedBuildingControl.BRAND[SupportedB: The following brands supports the current company.
AdvancedBuildingControl.LevelInfo: Change the building level and/or the number of household for this building.
AdvancedBuildingControl.ResetLevelToolti: Reset the building level to this building's default.
AdvancedBuildingControl.MaxHouseholdTool: As rent factor changes over time, simulation may break if rent reach below $1. So it is recommended to have a household value near 10% of the max capacity.
AdvancedBuildingControl.WorkplaceInfo: Change the number of workplace employed by this service building.
AdvancedBuildingControl.STORAGE[Informat:
Toggle the resource to change the Stored Resources.

Any exisiting resource will be removed if a resource is deselected.
AdvancedBuildingControl.STORAGE[ResetToo: Reset to this building's default tradeable resources. The process is irreversible and any removed resources will not be returned.
AdvancedBuildingControl.UTILITIES[Inform: Change the building's utility production data.
AdvancedBuildingControl.UTILITIES[ResetP: Reset the building's water pump capacity to this building's default.
AdvancedBuildingControl.UTILITIES[ResetD: Reset the building's sewage dump capacity to this building's default.
AdvancedBuildingControl.UTILITIES[ResetP: Reset the building's power production capacity to this building's default.
AdvancedBuildingControl.VehicleInfo: Adjust how many vehicles this building can deploy.
AdvancedBuildingControl.FinalTooltip: Includes the main building value plus all upgrades.
